candidates.derivation: two explicitly dated events define the observation window
candidates.evidence_text: Seizure history and current status: His initial event was in April 2019 in Germany, arising from sleep. He awoke with jerking of the left arm and facial twitching. A second event occurred in Italy the following July 2019, once more during the night, lasting four minutes with similar semiology.
